name: California Confection
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a 9 x 13 inch baking pan using the microwave or by pre-heating an oven.
2. Mix in cracker crumbs, wheat germ, sunflower seeds, and figs; press into an even layer.
3. Pour non-fat sweetened condensed milk evenly over the crumb mixture.
4. Top with coconut and walnuts, pressing down lightly.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes until golden brown.
6. Allow to cool completely.
7. Serve in small squares or break into toffee-like pieces.
8. Enjoy as candy, trail mix, or top fresh fruit or ice cream with this California Confection.
Source: Fabulous Figs The Fitness Fruit, Reprinted with the permission of The California Fig Advisory Board, Electronic format courtesy of Karen Mintzias
